title: Downgrade: Here's How Analysts See SolarEdge Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ:SEDG) Performing In The Near Term
text: SolarEdge Technologies 2024 Analyst Downgrades. Downgrades Overview: Multiple analysts downgraded SolarEdge Technologies in 2024 as the company faced significant operational challenges. Specific Downgrade Events: In July 2024, DZ Bank lowered SolarEdge Technologies from a hold rating to a sell rating with a 24.00 price target. In August 2024, Royal Bank of Canada lowered their price target on the stock from 37.00 to 35.00. Roth MKM cut their target price on SolarEdge Technologies from 27.00 to 23.00 and set a neutral rating. Analyst Sentiment: The analysts covering SolarEdge delivered negative revisions to their forecasts for 2024, with both revenue and earnings per share forecasts substantially revised downward. This suggests analysts had soured majorly on the business outlook. Impetus: The downgrades were driven by weak demand, particularly in Europe, inventory challenges, and concerns about the company's ability to achieve profitability.
